description: Settings Toggles for EVERYTHING: Add comprehensive settings toggles for all new integrations. Gmail on/off, Google Slides on/off, Spotify on/off + playlist URL input, Email deadline reminders on/off, Daily digest on/off, Weekly review on/off, preserve existing AI suggestions toggle, Auto-Pilot default mode selector. All persist via localStorage and backend user preferences endpoint.
steps: 1. Create backend endpoint GET/PUT /api/preferences in backend/app/main.py or a new router backend/app/api/preferences.py. GET returns the user's current preferences and notification_preferences from Firestore. PUT accepts a partial update object and persists to Firestore via UserRepository.update().
2. Add frontend API functions in frontend/lib/api-extended.ts: fetchPreferences(authToken) and updatePreferences(authToken, prefs).

3. Rewrite the Settings page (frontend/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx) Integrations section to add toggles for: Gmail integration on/off (key: chronai-gmail-enabled), Google Slides on/off (key: chronai-slides-enabled), Spotify on/off + text input for playlist URL (key: chronai-spotify-playlist-url). Keep existing Spotify connect/disconnect pattern but enhance it.

4. Add a new 'Notifications' section in the Settings page with toggles for: Email deadline reminders on/off (key: chronai-email-deadline-reminders), Daily digest email on/off (key: chronai-daily-digest), Weekly review email on/off (key: chronai-weekly-review). These should save both to localStorage AND to the backend preferences endpoint.
5. Ensure the existing AI Suggestions toggle and Auto-Pilot mode selector remain as-is in the AI Preferences section. Add the Auto-Pilot default mode note if not already there.

6. Make sure all toggles dispatch StorageEvents so other components (like SpotifyMiniPlayer, GmailScanModal button visibility) can react to changes. The Gmail scan button on tasks page should check localStorage 'chronai-gmail-enabled' before showing. The Slides button should check 'chronai-slides-enabled'.

7. On settings page mount, call fetchPreferences to load backend-stored preferences and sync them to localStorage. On any toggle change, update both localStorage and call updatePreferences to persist to backend.
acceptance_criteria: Backend GET/PUT /api/preferences endpoints compile and work with Firestore
Settings page has dedicated Integrations section with Gmail, Slides, Spotify toggles
Settings page has Notifications section with Email reminders, Daily digest, Weekly review toggles
Spotify section includes text input for custom playlist URL
All toggles persist to both localStorage and backend
Existing AI Suggestions and Auto-Pilot toggles are preserved
StorageEvents dispatched on toggle changes for cross-component reactivity
Gmail scan button and Slides button respect their enabled/disabled settings
python -m py_compile on preferences endpoint passes
findings: All verification passed: npm run build, npm run lint, python -m py_compile on both main.py and preferences.py. The preferences router uses partial merge updates via UserRepository.update(). Notification toggles persist to both localStorage and backend. Integration toggles (Gmail, Slides, Spotify) are localStorage-only since they control frontend visibility only. StorageEvents dispatched on all toggle changes for cross-component reactivity. Custom 'chronai-playlist-changed' event also dispatched when playlist URL changes.
